raw_profile_text:
Anthony Zheng
He/Him
Software Engineer @ Meta
Meta · Georgia Institute of Technology
New York, New York, United States
500+ connections
598 followers

About
Hey, I'm Anthony! 📍 I'm a software engineer at Meta NYC 😄 I love solving problems and helping people 👨‍💻 I'm interested in software and working on meaningful products 📸 I enjoy discovering new things, documenting memories, and playing music… more

Experience
Meta · Full-time · 4 yrs 2 mos · New York, New York, United States
- Senior Software Engineer · Jul 2023 - Present · 2 yrs 9 mos
- Software Engineer II · Jul 2022 - Jun 2023 · 1 yr
- Software Engineer · Feb 2022 - Jun 2022 · 5 mos

Undergraduate Teaching Assistant · College of Computing at Georgia Tech · May 2019 - Dec 2021 · 2 yrs 8 mos · Atlanta, Georgia, United States
• Assisted course instructor in teaching 500+ students for CS 1301: Introduction to Computing in Python • Taught weekly 75-minute recitations to 50 students to reinforce course concepts • Collaborated closely with the instructor to write, review, and publish assignments and exams • Held weekly office hours to offer additional help to students on course material and test preparation • Automated the grading process by developing autograders to conduct unit tests on student submissions… more

Software Engineer Intern · Facebook · Full-time · May 2021 - Aug 2021 · 4 mos · Menlo Park, California, United States
• Expanded the global launch of Instagram Reels Ads by implementing features in Hack and React • Generated 5x more ad revenue by enabling additional advertisers to opt-in to Reels Ads • Optimized system performance by employing asynchronous programming paradigms • Conducted A/B testing to monitor metrics and gradually roll out new features to the public • Spearheaded projects by defining requirements and collaborating with cross-functional team members… more

Software Engineer Intern · Tesla · Full-time · Jun 2020 - Aug 2020 · 3 mos · Fremont, California, United States
• Leveraged Django and Python to build full-stack features for vehicle pricing across available markets • Automated price releases for Tesla vehicles, reducing 20 hours of manual effort to 2 hours per week • Designed GraphQL and REST API endpoints to provide access to internal services • Developed multithreaded functions to generate product prices more efficiently • Utilized a CI/CD pipeline to deploy systems into a containerized environment… more

Education
Georgia Institute of Technology · Bachelor of Science - BS, Computer Science · 2018 – 2021
Concentration: • Information Internetworks • Media… more

Matanzas High School · High School Diploma · 2014 – 2018
Activities and societies: • Marching Band • Symphonic Band • Flagler County All-County Band • Interact Club • Leo Club • National Honor Society • Mu Alpha Theta • Varsity Lacrosse… more

Projects
Wurdle – Web App · Feb 2022 – Feb 2022 · https://antzheng.github.io/wurdle
Chess – Web App · Jul 2021 – Jul 2021 · https://antzheng.github.io/chess/

Volunteering
Leo Club · Matanzas High School · Apr 2015 - Apr 2018 · 3 yrs 1 mo · Health
• Assisted in orchestrating the biannual Pancake Breakfast at our high school to raise funds for seeing eye dogs for the vision-impaired • Served as a volunteer in the annual Buddy Walk to promote acceptance and inclusion for those with Down syndrome • Volunteered in the annual Walk to End Alzheimer's to raise awareness and funds for support, care, and research of Alzheimer's… more

Interact Club · Matanzas High School · Dec 2016 - Apr 2018 · 1 yr 5 mos · Disaster and Humanitarian Relief
• Distributed 17 tons of food monthly to the town of Pierson, Florida • Packaged 14,000 meals with Rise Against Hunger each year to send to developing nations • Worked with other volunteers to pick up trash and clean up the beach annually… more

Skills
Python (Passed LinkedIn Skill Assessment; endorsed by Damian H. and 6 others who are highly skilled at this; endorsed by 4 colleagues at Meta)
JavaScript (Passed LinkedIn Skill Assessment; endorsed by Elton Pinto who is highly skilled at this; endorsed by 4 colleagues at Meta)

Recommendations
Received from Soumya Jithu (Principal Architect | Ex-Tesla) on August 18, 2020: Anthony is a very talented developer and and would be an asset to any team. The work that he has accomplished while he was working with Tesla are outstanding. He has in depth knowledge of Python, data structures and algorithms. He writes clean code, has great speed in accomplishing deliverables and is a great team member to work with. All the best for all his future endeavors.

Languages
Chinese – Limited working proficiency
English – Native or bilingual proficiency
